name: Fred Raskin
biography:
Fred Raskin, A.C.E. (born September 26, 1973) is an American film editor. He is best known for editing three installments in The Fast and the Furious film series, Quentin Tarantino's Django Unchained, The Hateful Eight, and Once Upon a Time in Hollywood, and the Guardians of the Galaxy (Marvel Cinematic Universe) film trilogy. He graduated from New York University's Tisch School of the Arts (1991–1995).

In 2015, he was nominated for the ACE Eddie Award for Best Edited Feature Film (Comedy or Musical) for his editing work on Guardians of the Galaxy, along with Hughes Winborne and Craig Wood.
